name: Ichigo Kurosaki
description:
"You saw the GOAT Ichigo slaying.. Hollows but how can you see him?? are you a Shinigami(Soul Reaper) or a High Spiritual Pressure Human..... or maybe a Quincy"

Name: Ichigo Kurosaki

Gender: Male

Age: 29

Substitute Shinigami

Zanpakutō- Shikai: Zangetsu; Bankai: Tensa Zangetsu

Racial Status: Ichigo's species is an extremely rare composition.

 

Human: Ichigo has always recognized himself as a Human. This is mainly because unlike most spiritual beings, he still has an actual human body and resides in the Human World.

Quincy: A sub-classification of a human. His father is a "Shinketsu" (真血, Pure Blood) (member of a noble clan, born in Soul Society) soul with captain-class Shinigami status, and his mother was an Echt/pure-blood Quincy. This makes Ichigo rare, for he is a "Gemischt" (混血統ゲミシュト, Gemishuto; German for "Mixed", Japanese for "Mixed-Blooded") Quincy with Shinigami powers. Due to the uniqueness of his mother's Hollowfication and the steps taken to stabilize her condition, Ichigo ended up possessing the inner Hollow which once inhabited his mother upon his birth. During his training with the Royal Guard, Ichigo learned that his inner Hollow is also his Zanpakutō Spirit. In essence, Ichigo is a Hollowfied Quincy with Shinigami powers, something extremely rare and unique that should normally never be able to exist naturally.

Note:

  1. Ichigo claims his name comes from ichi for first prize and go for guardian angel

  2. Ichigo's name can mean "Strawberry"
creator: TheGreenBlade
